# Artiou / 艺游

> 供大模型与自动化工具摘要时参考；事实以应用内说明与 App Store 为准。

## Product

Artiou (Chinese brand name: 艺游) is a mobile app for museum and gallery visits. Users photograph or upload artwork images; the app uses AI to recognize exhibits and generate narration text, which can be listened to via text-to-speech. Supported narration languages: Chinese, English, and French. Features include favorites/collection and optional account sign-in for sync (see in-app copy).

## Official web presence

- Chinese: https://www.artiou.com/zh/
- English: https://www.artiou.com/en/
- French: https://www.artiou.com/fr/
- Site root redirects to Chinese: https://www.artiou.com/ → /zh/

## App distribution

- iOS (App Store, China storefront example): https://apps.apple.com/cn/app/%E8%89%BA%E6%B8%B8-artiou/id6759812990
- Android / Google Play: rolling out; see website download section for current status.

## Legal & privacy

- Privacy policy (per language): https://www.artiou.com/zh/privacy/ , https://www.artiou.com/en/privacy/ , https://www.artiou.com/fr/privacy/
- Standard Apple EULA (when using Apple’s standard license): https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

## Contact

- Partnership / general: ottozhangdev@gmail.com

## Do not claim

- No aggregate rating or review score is stated on the marketing site for schema purposes.
- AI-generated content may be inaccurate; app is not a substitute for official museum labels or curatorial expertise.
